stemHtml: The Trip Fuel for a Commercial Air Transport flight includes fuel from…

options.a: top of climb to top of descent, excluding step climbs and descents during the cruise.
options.b: the block position to landing including the expected departure, arrival, approach, climb and descent.
options.c: take-off to landing including the expected departure, arrival, approach, climb and descent.
options.d: the end of the departure route to the beginning of the arrival route, including the climb and descent.
